name: African Cheetah Hunting Simulator
description: In this game, the cheetah needs to find and hunt zebras. Many levels are waiting to be completed, each with a specific number of animals to hunt. The game features a realistic African savanna environment with trees, grass, and large, dangerous animals like rhinoceroses. Website Developer <a href='https://www.bestcrazygames.com/'>https://www.bestcrazygames.com/</a>
instructions: Use WASD to controll the animal and button from the screen to run jump attack
tags: Action, Animal, hunter, Hunting, Mentolatux, Simulator, Skill, Unity3D, WebGL
